attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.REQUEST_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.EXP_STATUS, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.SHIPSET_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.NEW_REQUEST_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.LATEST_ACCEPTABLE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.NEW_PROMISED_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.LAST_UPDATED_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.PROMISED_DATE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.DOLLAR_AMOUNT, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.REQD_LINE_IDS, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.EXP_PRIORITY, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES,
 (
 select REQUEST_LINE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES
 minus
 select REQUEST_LINE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXGCO_EXP_REQUEST_LINES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.REQUEST_LINE_ID = STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.REQUEST_LINE_ID  and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXGCO_EXP_RQST_LINES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXGCO_EXP_REQUEST_LINES)
